code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = io.read_line()
  match line
  when Some(s)
    let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
    mut total = 0
    mut i = 0
    while i < parts.len()
      match parts.get(i)
      when Some(tok)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(n)
          if n > 0
            total = total + n * 2
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    print("result=#{total}")
  when None
    print("result=0")
  end
end
